name: Ensemble Studios
cause: Disbanded by Microsoft mere months after shipping Halo Wars — the biggest launch of their lives doubled as their funeral.
epitaph: They built empires that outlived the empire-builders.

name: FASA Studio
cause: Quietly shuttered as Microsoft retreated from making its own games.
epitaph: Piloted hundred-ton mechs. Could not dodge a memo.

name: Digital Anvil
cause: Absorbed, downsized, and finally dissolved into Microsoft Game Studios.

name: Lionhead Studios
cause: Closed after Fable Legends was cancelled. The fabled acorn never grew into a tree.
epitaph: Promised a giant. Delivered a headstone.

name: Press Play
cause: Shut down the same week its next project, Knoxville, was cancelled.
epitaph: Pressed Start. Then someone pressed Stop.

name: Arkane Austin
cause: Closed in the May 2024 culling, a vampire shooter away from the immersive sims that made its name.
epitaph: Masters of the immersive sim, dismissed at dawn.

name: Tango Gameworks
cause: Closed only months after the beloved, award-winning Hi-Fi Rush — proof that good reviews are not a pulse.
epitaph: Survived its own horror games. Not the spreadsheet.
revived: Later acquired by Krafton and brought back from the dead — a rare resurrection.

name: Alpha Dog Games
cause: Put down in the same May 2024 round of closures, mid-stride.
